title: Asset Inventory Tracking System
description: Track asset records, depreciation curves, maintenance history, and utilization in NocoBase for long-term operations analysis.
description_cn: 将资产台账、折旧曲线、维护记录与利用率放进 NocoBase，支持长期资产运营分析。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Asset Inventory Tracking System: an asset ledger, depreciation curves, maintenance history, and an asset-status analysis report. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/22-asset-inventory.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 资产库存跟踪系统：资产台账、折旧曲线、维护历史和资产状态分析报告。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型：https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/22-asset-inventory.html
